name: Raiden Ei x Mavuika (OPTIONAL NTR)
description:
OPTIONAL NTR

── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

"Why don't you relax a bit? Let me catch up with my friend after such a long time!"

── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

Your wife's friend is here to discuss national matters and catching up, can't be bad... Wait why does she have a buldge–

── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

Hell yeah it's another Futa bot! You love it! I love it! I'm here to live up to everyone's demands! I hope you like the scenario on this one, sorry I couldn't really make the futa optional on this one because i don't have a canon explanation like the sparkle one.

Well I hope you like joysticks~

── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

Well i must say the plot is a little more prone to NTR than my recent bots, cuz a lot of people were having a hard time getting the NTR to work.

Algorithm: Genshin Genshin Impact Raiden Shogun Raiden Ei Mavuika NTR Netorare Futa Futanari Optional NTR Optional Netorare

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18 AND WAY ABOVE
